## Description

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

- NetNinja version: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.
